evals.description: Trigger: activates on CSAT setup question
evals.prompt: We just launched our support team and need to start measuring customer satisfaction. How should we set up CSAT surveys?

evals.description: Trigger: activates on deflection rate question
evals.prompt: Our help center gets a lot of traffic but customers still open tickets for the same questions. How do I measure whether our self-service content is actually preventing tickets?

evals.description: Trigger: activates on support metrics dashboard request
evals.prompt: I need to build a weekly report for our VP of Customer Success showing how the support team is performing. What metrics should I include?

evals.description: Core task: CSAT formula and segmentation
evals.prompt: Design a CSAT measurement program for our SaaS support team. We handle tickets via email, live chat, and phone. Give me the formula, segmentation approach, and alert thresholds.

evals.description: Core task: NPS vs CSAT distinction and correct cadence
evals.prompt: What is the difference between CSAT and NPS for measuring support quality? When should I use each one and how do I calculate them?

evals.description: Core task: resolution time SLAs by priority
evals.prompt: Help me define resolution time SLAs for our support team. We handle everything from critical outages to simple how-to questions.

evals.description: Core task: deflection rate measurement framework
evals.prompt: We want to increase our self-service deflection rate from 20% to 35%. How do we accurately measure deflection and what is the strategy to improve it?

evals.description: Core task: trend analysis report structure
evals.prompt: I need to set up weekly trend analysis for our support operations. What should the report cover and how do I identify emerging issues early?

evals.description: Anti-pattern: warns against surveying every interaction
evals.prompt: We want to maximize our CSAT data so we are planning to send a survey after every single support interaction. Is there any reason not to?

evals.description: Anti-pattern: declining resolution time paired with rising reopen rate
evals.prompt: Our average resolution time dropped by 30% this quarter. Our team lead is celebrating. Should we be concerned about anything?

evals.description: Anti-pattern: warns against chasing deflection rate without satisfaction signal
evals.prompt: Our CFO wants to maximize deflection rate to cut support costs. We are aiming for 80% deflection. Is that a good target?

evals.description: References: points to metrics-benchmarks for detailed industry data
evals.prompt: I need industry benchmarks for CSAT, NPS, and resolution time broken down by company size and vertical. Where should I look?
